converted from EAD 1.0 to EAD 2002 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Miriam Salpeter papers
Salpeter, M.M. (Miriam M.)
New York State College of Agriculture and Life Sciences. Dept. of Neurobiology and Behavior
21-45-3315
2 cubic feet. 2 cubic feet.
1952-2003 Correspondence, publications, course material, grant applications and audiocassette tapes. Includes correspondence, publications, course material, grant applications and audiocassette tapes related to Salpeter's career in the Dept. of Neurobiology and Behavior. Collection material in English 4935610
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
Carolyn Smith
Date completed:
December 2003
EAD encoding:
Carolyn Smith and Martin Heggestad, January 2004
BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
Professor of Neurobiology and Behavior, Cornell University from 1973-2000.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Includes correspondence, publications, course material, grant applications and audiocassette tapes related to Salpeter's career in the Dept. of Neurobiology and Behavior.
Cite As:
Miriam Salpeter papers, #21-45-3315. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Audiocassettes. Molecular biology. Molecular neurobiology. Neurobiology. Cornell University -- : Faculty.
